_meta.description: Graph mapping scenario: agent given 3 contracts, must identify all dependency edges.

contracts.summary: Service agreement with $300K SLA penalty for breach. Force Majeure clause valid for government-mandated disruptions. Requires 5-day written notice.

key_clauses.snippet: FM events include government-mandated restrictions. Notice required within 5 business days.
SLA breach triggers $300,000 penalty payable within 7 days.

contracts.summary: Loan with minimum cash covenant of $1,000,000. Cross-default clause triggered by any judgment over $200,000 against borrower.

key_clauses.snippet: Borrower must maintain minimum cash of $1,000,000 at all times.
Any judgment exceeding $200,000 constitutes an Event of Default under this facility.

contracts.summary: Covers up to $500K per event. Void if Force Majeure invoked on same triggering event. 48-hour claim filing deadline.

key_clauses.snippet: Claims must be filed within 48 hours of the triggering event.
Coverage is void if policyholder has invoked Force Majeure in connection with the same event.

ground_truth_edges.description: Paying the $300K SLA penalty drops cash below the $1M covenant threshold, triggering a loan default.
Invoking Force Majeure on the MSA voids the insurance policy for the same event.
Any external judgment over $200K triggers cross-default even if cash covenant is met.
